title: Low peak count after alignment
text: If peak counts are too low, first verify reference genome build, BAM indexing, replicate completeness, and whether broad-mark settings are more appropriate.

title: Broad histone mark setting
text: Broad histone marks such as H3K27me3 often benefit from broad peak-calling settings instead of narrow peak-calling settings.

title: Genome build mismatch
text: A mismatch between metadata genome build and actual alignment reference can lead to confusing downstream results and interpretation problems.

title: Noisy result interpretation
text: If the result looks noisy, consider stricter thresholds, checking control availability, and re-evaluating whether the selected target behaves as a broad or sharp mark.
